creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Update to Nagios Plugins 1.4.15.

<side-issue>
This PR follows on from, and corrects, ports/150301 which I am having trouble responding to due to a domain name change.  It would appear that jarrod@netleader.com.au aged out much sooner than expected and is causing some return email issues.  Included in this patch is an update to the maintainers (i.e. my) email address - the same change occurred on net-mgmt/nagios-plugins a few weeks ago.

My attempts to contact ohauer@ about this issue have so far failed.
</side-issue>

Fix: Patch supplied.
